---
title: "第11章"
---

# 11 Chi-Square Tests

<img src="img/teacher.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[chap11
        讲义](https://lizongzhang.github.io/business_stat/chap11.html)
        
# 课堂练习

<details>
<summary>Click to view image</summary>

P421，Ex 11.18

<img src="img/ex11_18.png" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">

At the 0.05 significance level, test whether age group and listening to rock music are independent.

1.Write the null and alternative hypotheses for this test.

2.Calculate the expected frequency for this test.

3.Report the chi-square test statistic.

4.What's your conclusion? $\quad \chi^2_{0.05}(2) = 5.991$



</details>


# 教学视频 

## Excel操作视频


<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[EXCEL 独立性检验 CHISQ.TEST函数的使用](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV19A411x7EU/)

## SPSS操作视频

<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[SPSS 独立性检验：两个定性变量是否相互独立？](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1pD4y1R7KC)


<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[SPSS 列联表分析应用举例](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Kp4y167vZ)

# 拓展资源

<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">独立性检验计算器 <https://www.standarddeviationcalculator.io/chi-square-calculator>{target="_blank"}

# 复习


<img src="img/teacher.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[知识点思维导图](https://lizongzhang.github.io/business_stat/review.html){target="_blank"}
